title: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE: LINKING FARMERS, ADVISORS AND RESEARCHERS TO BOOST INNOVATION
subtitle: PRACTICE ABSTRACT NR. 36
description: A guide showcasing how a Living Lab in Navarra brings together farmers, advisors, and researchers to test and validate decision support tools for optimising fertilisation and irrigation in nitrate vulnerable zones. It highlights the cooperative role of INTIA and innovation agents in implementing field trials and disseminating proven solutions.
